description_long: This is a World War II-era military airplane with a twin-engine, twin-propeller configuration and a distinctive glass canopy cockpit. The fuselage is painted in a camouflage pattern of olive green and gray, with German Luftwaffe insignia visible on the wings and tail. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, featuring prominent underwing structures and antenna arrays on the nose, suggesting a specialized reconnaissance or night-fighter role. The tail section has a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear appears to be fixed in a taildragger configuration, with the main wheels under the wings and a small tail wheel. The overall design is robust, with multiple access panels and a multi-seat cockpit, indicating a crewed operational role.
description: A twin-engine, propeller-driven military airplane with a glass canopy cockpit, camouflage paint, and German insignia. It features mid-mounted straight wings, a conventional tail, and fixed taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, cockpit canopy, twin engines, and detailed wing and tail markings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail structure, horizontal stabilizers, and the symmetry of the twin engines and wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the fuselage, engines, and underwing details, with clear visibility of the cockpit and tail.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the twin propellers, nose-mounted antenna arrays, and the broad wingspan.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible sweep or winglets; features underwing structures and antenna arrays.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings, each driving a propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with a glass canopy and multiple window panels.
